response:
Sec. 1
[THE INEQUALITY TO DETERMINE THE RANGE OF SALES REVENUE X FOR WHICH PUBLISHER A'S OFFER IS MORE LUCRATIVE THAN PUBLISHER B'S OFFER IS: 3000 + 0.05x > 1500 + 0.10x]

Sec. 2
[THE INEQUALITY CAN BE SOLVED BY SUBTRACTING 0.05x FROM BOTH SIDES AND THEN SUBTRACTING 1500 FROM BOTH SIDES, RESULTING IN 1500 > -0.05x]

Sec. 3
[THIS CAN BE REARRANGED TO 1500 - 1500 > -0.05x - 1500, WHICH SIMPLIFIES TO 0 > -0.05x - 1500]

Sec. 4
[ADDING 1500 TO BOTH SIDES RESULTS IN 3000 > -0.05x]

Sec. 5
[THIS CAN BE REARRANGED TO 3000 + 3000 > -0.05x + 3000, WHICH SIMPLIFIES TO 6000 > -0.05x + 3000]

Sec. 6
[SUBTRACTING 3000 FROM BOTH SIDES RESULTS IN 3000 > -0.05x]

Sec. 7
[THIS CAN BE REARRANGED TO 3000 + 3000 > -0.05x + 3000, WHICH SIMPLIFIES TO 6000 > -0.05x + 3000]

Sec. 8
[THE FINAL SOLUTION IS 3000 > -0.05x, WHICH CAN BE REARRANGED TO x < -60000]
